title: lobelia cuneifolia var. hirsutum
intro: Lobelia cuneifolia var. hirsutum, also known as hairy-leaved lobelia or hairy lobelia, is a plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Lobelia cuneifolia var. hirsutum include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and wellness.
